title: The Mathematics of Stuttering as Trapped EML-3

fluent_speech.description: Fluent speech: EML-3 smooth oscillatory phoneme sequence

stutter_loop.description: Stutter: trapped in EML-3 local loop on one phoneme

escape_categorification.description: Fluent speakers escape loop via unconscious categorification
escape_categorification.reason: EML-3 → EML-inf → next phoneme = unconscious Deltad

stuttering_law.description: T476: stuttering is trapped EML-3; fluency requires unconscious EML-inf categorification to escape each loop
